title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.165 - Termination of agency's participation in plan for failure to pay — no payment of claims during period of nonpayment
text:
103.165.  Termination of agency's participation in plan for failure to pay — no payment of claims during period of nonpayment. — If any participating member agency fails to make any payment due the plan, the board may terminate the agency's participation in the plan and stop paying claims accrued during the period of nonpayment.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 4 subsec. 11)
